topWPAPlays.description: Manny Machado homers (11) on a fly ball to left center field. Gavin Sheets scores.
Bryson Stott singles on a ground ball to left fielder Gavin Sheets. Bryce Harper scores. Brandon Marsh to 2nd.
Adolis García homers (5) on a fly ball to left center field.
Xander Bogaerts grounds into a force out, shortstop Trea Turner to second baseman Bryson Stott. Jackson Merrill out at 2nd. Xander Bogaerts to 1st.
Alec Bohm challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Alec Bohm called out on strikes.
Coby Mayo doubles (6) on a fly ball to left fielder Jarren Duran. Samuel Basallo scores. Leody Taveras scores. Colton Cowser scores.
Leody Taveras singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. Gunnar Henderson scores. Samuel Basallo to 3rd.

Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, shortstop Isiah Kiner-Falefa to second baseman Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras. Gunnar Henderson to 3rd. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.
Adley Rutschman singles on a line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Taylor Ward scores. Gunnar Henderson to 2nd.
Taylor Ward doubles (16) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
Ryan McMahon singles on a ground ball to right fielder Angel Martínez. Jazz Chisholm Jr. scores.
Stuart Fairchild singles on a ground ball to left fielder Cody Bellinger. José Ramírez scores. Rhys Hoskins to 2nd.
Jazz Chisholm Jr. flies into a sacrifice double play, left fielder Steven Kwan to third baseman José Ramírez. Paul Goldschmidt scores. Cody Bellinger out at 3rd.
Paul Goldschmidt grounds into a double play, third baseman José Ramírez to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Ben Rice out at 2nd. Paul Goldschmidt out at 1st.
Travis Bazzana grounds out softly, pitcher David Bednar to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.
Casey Schmitt homers (13) on a fly ball to left center field.
Bryce Eldridge singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Garrett Mitchell. Luis Arraez scores. Jung Hoo Lee to 3rd.

Mauricio Dubón homers (5) on a fly ball to left field.
Myles Straw singles on a ground ball to center fielder Michael Harris II. Kazuma Okamoto scores. Charles McAdoo scores. Nathan Lukes to 2nd.

Carter Jensen doubles (9) on a ground ball to left fielder Trevor Larnach. Isaac Collins scores. Kyle Isbel scores. Carter Jensen to 3rd.

Bobby Witt Jr. reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Ryan Kreidler. Carter Jensen scores. Bobby Witt Jr. to 2nd.
Ryan Kreidler triples (1) on a line drive to center fielder Kyle Isbel, deflected by left fielder Isaac Collins. Trevor Larnach scores.
Dansby Swanson singles on a ground ball to center fielder Henry Bolte. Kevin Alcántara scores. Seiya Suzuki to 3rd.
Pete Crow-Armstrong singles on a fly ball to right fielder Lawrence Butler. Seiya Suzuki scores. Dansby Swanson to 3rd.
Shea Langeliers hits an inside-the-park home run (16) on a fly ball to center field. Henry Bolte scores.
Henry Bolte doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Alika Williams scores.
Umpire reviewed (home run), call on the field was upheld: Shea Langeliers homers (15) on a fly ball to right center field.
Ryan O'Hearn homers (9) on a fly ball to right field. Bryan Reynolds scores.
